<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<meta name="description" content="Two original PRINCE2 7 Practitioner-style practice exams with study mode, detailed rationales and timed exam mode.">
<title>PRINCE2 7 Practitioner Interactive Practice</title>
<style>
:root{--navy:#17324d;--blue:#275d85;--pale:#eef4f8;--line:#c9d6df;--ok:#e6f4e8;--bad:#fbe9e7;--warn:#fff4cc;--text:#17202a;--muted:#5d6975}
*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;background:#f5f7f9;color:var(--text);line-height:1.45}
header{background:var(--navy);color:white;padding:16px 22px;display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5;box-shadow:0 2px 8px #0002}
header h1{font-size:20px;margin:0}.sub{font-size:12px;opacity:.85}.toolbar{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
select,button,.toolbar a{font:inherit;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 11px;background:white;color:var(--text)}button{cursor:pointer}.toolbar a{text-decoration:none;display:inline-block}button.primary{background:var(--blue);color:white;border-color:var(--blue)}button.danger{background:#8b2f2f;color:white;border-color:#8b2f2f}button:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}
.timer{font-weight:bold;min-width:82px;text-align:center;background:#0e2234;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:7px}
.layout{max-width:1320px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:250px minmax(0,1fr);gap:18px;padding:18px}
aside{background:white;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;height:calc(100vh - 100px);position:sticky;top:82px;overflow:auto}
.progressbar{height:8px;background:#e7edf2;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;margin:8px 0 12px}.progressbar span{display:block;height:100%;background:var(--blue)}
.navigator{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:6px}.qnav{padding:7px 0;font-size:12px}.qnav.answered{background:#dbeaf4}.qnav.current{outline:3px solid #f0b429}.qnav.revealed{background:var(--ok)}
main{min-width:0}.card{background:white;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:14px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px #0001}
.scenario h2,.question h2{margin:0 0 8px;color:var(--navy)}.scenario details summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:bold;color:var(--blue)}
.meta{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:12px}.option{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin:9px 0;cursor:pointer}.option:hover{background:#f7fafc}.option input{margin-top:4px}.letter{font-weight:bold;min-width:20px}
.actions{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:space-between}.actions .left,.actions .right{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.answerbox{border-left:5px solid var(--blue);background:var(--pale)}.answerbox h3{margin-top:0;color:var(--navy)}.clue{background:var(--warn);padding:10px;border-radius:7px}.takeaway{background:#eef0f8;padding:10px;border-radius:7px;font-weight:bold}
.reviewtable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:10px}.reviewtable th,.reviewtable td{border:1px solid var(--line);padding:8px;vertical-align:top}.reviewtable th{background:#d9eaf7}.reviewtable tr.correct{background:var(--ok)}.reviewtable tr.incorrect{background:var(--bad)}
.results .score{font-size:36px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy)}footer{max-width:1320px;margin:0 auto 24px;padding:0 18px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}footer a{color:var(--blue)}.hidden{display:none!important}.notice{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}
@media(max-width:850px){header{position:static;align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:10px}aside{position:static;height:auto}.navigator{grid-template-columns:repeat(8,1fr)}}
@media print{header,aside,.actions{display:none!important}.layout{display:block;padding:0}.card{box-shadow:none;break-inside:avoid}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
  <div><h1>PRINCE2® 7 Practitioner Interactive Practice</h1><div class="sub">Original practice material • Study mode and timed exam mode</div></div>
  <div class="toolbar">
    <label>Exam <select id="examSelect"><option value="A">A - CareLink</option><option value="B">B - RiverCity</option></select></label>
    <label>Mode <select id="modeSelect"><option value="study">Study / reveal answer</option><option value="timed">Timed exam</option></select></label>
    <span id="timer" class="timer">150:00</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/GKastner87/prince2-practitioner-practice">GitHub</a><button id="resetBtn">Reset</button>
  </div>
</header>
<div class="layout">
<aside>
  <strong id="examTitle"></strong>
  <div class="progressbar"><span id="progressFill"></span></div>
  <div id="progressText" class="notice"></div>
  <hr>
  <div id="navigator" class="navigator"></div>
  <hr>
  <div class="notice"><b>Study mode:</b> answer, then reveal the rationale and references.<br><br><b>Timed mode:</b> answers stay hidden until submission. Progress is saved in this browser.</div>
</aside>
<main>
  <section id="scenarioCard" class="card scenario"><h2>Loading practice exams…</h2></section>
  <section id="questionCard" class="card question"></section>
  <section id="answerCard" class="card answerbox hidden"></section>
  <section class="card actions">
    <div class="left"><button id="prevBtn">Previous</button><button id="nextBtn">Next</button></div>
    <div class="right"><button id="checkBtn" class="primary">Check and reveal answer</button><button id="submitBtn" class="danger hidden">Submit exam</button></div>
  </section>
  <section id="resultsCard" class="card results hidden"></section>
</main>
</div>
<footer>Independent original practice material. Not affiliated with or endorsed by PeopleCert. PRINCE2® is a registered trademark of PeopleCert. <a href="https://github.com/GKastner87/prince2-practitioner-practice/blob/main/docs/DISCLAIMER.md">Read the disclaimer</a>.</footer>
<script>
const DATA_GZIP_B64="
